name: reddzone-migration
description: WordPress to Astro 5 migration for reddzone.net

members.name: fix-global-styles-and-fonts
fix-homepage-components
members.prompt:
Fix the homepage components and structure to match the WordPress site exactly. Make ALL changes as specified. ## 1. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/components/home/HeroSlider.svelte` The WP site has a single hero slide with heading "Welcome To The Redd Zone Where 21st Century fish culture begins" and a "Read More" CTA. The slider height is 860px on desktop. Replace the ENTIRE file: ```svelte
{#each slides as slide}

{slide.title}

{slide.subtitle}

{slide.cta.label}
{/each}
``` ## 2. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/components/home/MissionSection.astro` Replace with About section matching WP content. Section padding should be py-[100px], bg cream: ```astro --- import Container from '../ui/Container.astro'; import Button from '../ui/Button.astro'; ---

About Us

Redd Zone

Founded by two retired hatchery managers each with nearly thirty years of hatchery experience, Redd Zone is a family-owned business located in Astoria, Oregon near the confluence of the Columbia River and the Pacific Ocean.

Tod Jones and Jeremy Richardson bring decades of hands-on experience in fish culture and hatchery operations. Jeremy is a graduate of the University of Oregon's Institute of Molecular Biochemistry and is a retired detective.

``` ## 3. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/components/home/PartnerLogos.astro` Fix opacity from 0.6 to 0.2 default, show only 6 logos, section padding 100px, white bg: ```astro --- import { partners } from '../../data/partners.js'; import Container from '../ui/Container.astro'; ---
{partners.slice(0, 6).map((partner) => ( ))}
``` ## 4. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/components/home/ProductShowcase.astro` Change to match WP "Our Store" / "Featured Items" structure. Section padding 100px. Product names should match WP: ```astro --- import { getCollection } from 'astro:content'; import Container from '../ui/Container.astro'; import SectionHeading from '../ui/SectionHeading.astro'; import Card from '../ui/Card.astro'; import Button from '../ui/Button.astro'; const products = (await getCollection('products')) .filter((p) => p.data.featured) .sort((a, b) => a.data.order - b.data.order); ---
{products.map((product) => (

{product.data.title}

 ))}
``` ## 5. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/components/home/CTABanner.astro` Section padding 100px, update CTA text: ```astro --- import Container from '../ui/Container.astro'; import Button from '../ui/Button.astro'; ---

Ready to Get Started?

Contact us to discuss your hatchery needs or browse our merchandise shop.

``` ## 6. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/pages/index.astro` Remove BlogPreview from homepage (WP doesn't have it). Add a services "What We Do" section and a "Mission Statement" section. Add a "Why Choose" section. Replace the file: ```astro --- import BaseLayout from '../layouts/BaseLayout.astro'; import Header from '../components/layout/Header.astro'; import Footer from '../components/layout/Footer.astro'; import HeroSlider from '../components/home/HeroSlider.svelte'; import MissionSection from '../components/home/MissionSection.astro'; import ProductShowcase from '../components/home/ProductShowcase.astro'; import PartnerLogos from '../components/home/PartnerLogos.astro'; import CTABanner from '../components/home/CTABanner.astro'; import Container from '../components/ui/Container.astro'; import SectionHeading from '../components/ui/SectionHeading.astro'; import ServiceCard from '../components/about/ServiceCard.astro'; import { services } from '../data/services.js'; import { organizationSchema, webSiteSchema } from '../utils/seo.js'; ---

Redd Zone

Mission Statement

Redd Zone is dedicated to advancing the development of hatchery incubation equipment and protocols that reduce the environmental footprint of typical production hatcheries and improve the performance of restoration hatcheries.

Our innovations in early incubation reduce water use, allow for temperature adjustment and eliminate the need for using harsh chemicals.

{services.map((service) => ( ))}

Redd Zone

Why Choose Redd Zone

Redd Zone "Best Fry" incubators are the heart of our business. They are a product of several years of experimentation and observation by hands on hatchery managers and fish culturists. By addressing the reoccurring issues we have seen, the incubators have been designed and redesigned to solve chronic problems that we experienced working at other public and private hatcheries.

We listen and commit to helping our clients and partners meet their specific needs. We also pride ourselves in minimizing materials waste and recycling as much material as possible.

``` ## 7. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/data/services.js` Update service titles to match WP exactly: ```js export const services = [ { title: 'Natural Components', description: 'We use natural and sustainable materials whenever possible, reducing the environmental footprint of our manufacturing process.', icon: 'experience', }, { title: 'Large Selection', description: 'From small-scale tribal operations to large state facilities, we offer a wide range of equipment to meet any hatchery need.', icon: 'certificate', }, { title: 'Unique Patterns', description: 'Every piece of equipment is designed with unique flow patterns that maximize egg survival and fry health.', icon: 'holistic', }, { title: 'Creative People', description: 'Our team brings decades of hands-on hatchery experience and innovative thinking to every product we build.', icon: 'manufacturing', }, ]; ``` Read each file first before editing. Make ALL these changes.

members.name: fix-inner-pages
members.prompt:
Fix the following files to match the WordPress site exactly. Make ALL changes as specified. ## 1. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/components/contact/ContactInfo.astro` Fix email and phone to match WP: ```astro --- ---

Contact Details

Redd Zone is a family-owned business located in Astoria, Oregon.

Email

tod@reddzone.net

Phone

503 791 9854

Address

Astoria, Oregon, USA

``` ## 2. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/pages/contact-us.astro` Update the "Send Brief" mailto to use tod@reddzone.net: Change `href="mailto:info@reddzone.net"` to `href="mailto:tod@reddzone.net"` ## 3. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/components/shared/FAQAccordion.svelte` Update to match WP's FAQ styling (black bg tabs, white text, red active state): ```svelte
{#each items as item, i}
{#if openIndex === i}
{@html item.answer.replace(/\n/g, '
')}
{/if}
{/each}
``` ## 4. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/data/faq.js` Update FAQ content to match WP's exact pricing: ```js export const faqItems = [ { question: 'What are your prices for your incubators and Egg Eyeing Stations?', answer: `REDD ZONE PRODUCTS PRICE LIST

Best Fry Incubators:
24" Cube: $2,225.00
18" X 24": $2,025.00
18" Cube: $1,525.00
12" X 18": $575.00

Includes media, hatch plate(s), fry gate, gate valves(s) and plumbing

Portable Egg Eyeing Stations:
150,000 salmon egg capacity: $6,500
300,000 salmon egg capacity: $7,200
500,000 salmon egg capacity: $13,500.00
25 million egg Jumbo unit: $23,000.00`, }, { question: 'How much electrical power does your Instant Hatchery require?', answer: `ELECTRICAL SPECIFICATIONS REDD ZONE 20

The Instant Hatchery requires dedicated circuits for operation. Specific power draws and circuit requirements vary by configuration. Please contact us for detailed electrical specifications for your specific setup.`, }, { question: 'Do you offer installation and training?', answer: 'Yes, we provide full installation services and on-site training for all our equipment. Our team will travel to your facility, install the equipment, calibrate it for your specific water conditions, and train your staff on proper operation and maintenance. Remote support is also available for ongoing technical assistance.', }, { question: 'What species can your equipment handle?', answer: 'Our incubation equipment is designed to handle a wide range of salmonid species including Chinook salmon, Coho salmon, Steelhead trout, Rainbow trout, Cutthroat trout, and other coldwater species. We can customize tray configurations and water flow rates to match the specific requirements of your target species.', }, { question: 'Do you ship outside of the Pacific Northwest?', answer: 'Absolutely! While many of our clients are in Oregon, Washington, and California, we ship equipment nationwide and have worked with tribal hatcheries and conservation programs in Arizona, New Mexico, Idaho, and beyond. We can arrange freight shipping for larger equipment and provide remote installation support.', }, ]; ``` ## 5. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/content/products/vertical-incubator.md` Update title to match WP: Change the frontmatter title from "Vertical Incubator" to: ``` title: 'Redd Zone "Best Fry" Incubators' ``` ## 6. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/content/products/eyeing-station.md` Change frontmatter title to: ``` title: "Portable Egg Eyeing Stations" ``` ## 7. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/content/products/instant-hatchery.md` Change frontmatter title to: ``` title: "Instant Hatcheries" ``` ## 8. Add two new product files to match WP's 5 products. Create `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/content/products/hybrid-incubation.md`: ```markdown --- title: "Hybrid Incubation" description: "Hybrid incubation systems combining the best of vertical and horizontal incubation for maximum flexibility and egg survival rates." image: "https://ik.imagekit.io/1260/redd/products/vertical-incubator.jpg" order: 4 featured: false --- The Hybrid Incubation system combines vertical and horizontal incubation techniques for maximum flexibility in your hatchery operations. ## Features - Combined vertical and horizontal capability - Flexible tray configurations - Adaptable to multiple species - Space-efficient design - Easy maintenance and cleaning ``` Create `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/content/products/streamside-incubation.md`: ```markdown --- title: "Streamside Incubation (Hatch Boxes)" description: "Portable streamside incubation hatch boxes for remote egg incubation directly in natural stream environments." image: "https://ik.imagekit.io/1260/redd/products/tray-system.jpg" order: 5 featured: false --- Streamside incubation hatch boxes allow for egg incubation directly in the stream environment, providing natural water conditions for developing eggs. ## Features - Portable and lightweight design - Natural water flow utilization - Predator protection screens - Easy egg monitoring - Durable construction for stream conditions ``` ## 9. Delete the old product files that WP doesn't have: Delete `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/content/products/tray-system.md` Delete `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/content/products/water-management.md` ## 10. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/components/products/ProductCard.astro` Update CTA button text: Change "Contact Us for Pricing" to "Contact Redd Zone Team Member" ## 11. `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/components/partners/PartnerGrid.astro` Fix opacity from 0.6 to 0.2 default. Section padding 100px: ```astro --- import { partners } from '../../data/partners.js'; import Container from '../ui/Container.astro'; import SectionHeading from '../ui/SectionHeading.astro'; ---
{partners.map((partner) => (
))}
``` ## 12. All section pages - update padding from py-16 md:py-24 to py-[100px] For these files, change ALL instances of `py-16 md:py-24` to `py-[100px]`: - `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/pages/about-us.astro` - `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/pages/products.astro` - `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/pages/faq.astro` - `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/pages/contact-us.astro` - `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/pages/outreach-programs.astro` - `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/pages/merchandise.astro` - `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/pages/our-partners.astro` - `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/components/home/BlogPreview.astro` Also update `/Users/chad/Dropbox/Public/JS/Projects/websites/reddzone.net/src/pages/about-us.astro` specifically to change the team heading from "Meet Our Team" to "Meet the People Who Take Risks" and services heading from "Why Choose Reddzone" to "Take Your Craft to the Next Level". Read each file before editing. Make ALL changes.
